action_text: Click the "-- choose field --" dropdown in the filter builder
rationale: We need to build a condition "Short description contains ...". Opening the field selector in the filter builder is the first step.

action_text: Press Enter on the "-- choose field --" combobox to expand the field list
rationale: If clicking doesn’t open the field dropdown, pressing Enter on the focused combobox often expands it in ServiceNow.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-f9d328e8-a" into the Short description column search box
rationale: The per-column search row can directly filter the Short description column; entering the target string here satisfies the filter requirement quickly.

action_text: Open the "Search a specific field" dropdown above the list
rationale: Another route is the list’s “Search a specific field” control; opening it lets us switch to Short description and use the adjacent search box.

action_text: Right-click the Short description cell that contains "#SERIES-f9d328e8-a" to open the context menu
rationale: Right-clicking a cell with the desired text can bring up the context menu to “Show Matching,” which quickly applies a filter to that value.
